summary: Completed comprehensive testing of SOIN collaborative development platform. Backend APIs working perfectly (13/13 tests passed). Frontend core functionality working with beautiful dark theme and orange accents. Found session persistence issue affecting interactive features.

integration_issues.issue: Users get logged out unexpectedly during navigation, preventing testing of interactive features like chat and collaborators panel

passed_tests: All authentication endpoints (register, login, logout, me, refresh)
All project endpoints (create, list, get, collaborators, file tree)
Login page loads with proper styling and form elements
Register page loads with name/email/password inputs
Login flow authentication and dashboard redirect
Dashboard shows welcome message and New Project button
Project creation modal and navigation to workspace
Dark theme with orange accents implementation

success_percentage.frontend: 80% (core flows working, session issue prevents full testing)

action_item_for_main_agent: Fix session persistence issue - users are getting logged out unexpectedly during navigation, which prevents testing of interactive features like chat, collaborators panel, and real-time Socket.io functionality. The authentication works correctly but sessions don't persist properly between page navigations.
